headline: Micron Rides Record HBM Demand And US$200b AI Expansion Plans
summary: Micron Technology is experiencing unprecedented demand for high bandwidth memory (HBM) products, leading to sold-out 2026 production capacity. The company plans to invest at least $200 billion in new U.S. manufacturing facilities, supported by significant government subsidies, focusing on higher-margin AI and enterprise memory over lower-margin consumer segments.
why_it_matters: This development underscores Micron's strategic shift towards high-margin AI and enterprise memory markets, aligning with the growing demand for AI infrastructure and data centers, which is central to its long-term growth strategy.

headline: Axon reports Q4 2025 revenue of $797 million, up 39% year over year
summary: Axon Enterprise announced its Q4 2025 revenue of $797 million, marking a 39% increase from the previous year, driven by strong performance in both Software & Services and Connected Devices segments.
why_it_matters: This robust financial performance underscores Axon's expanding market presence and the effectiveness of its integrated public safety technology solutions, reinforcing its competitive moat and growth trajectory.

headline: Axon to acquire AI-powered 911 communications company Prepared, strengthening the public safety ecosystem from call to closure
summary: Axon announced a definitive agreement to acquire Prepared, an AI-powered emergency communications platform, aiming to enhance its public safety ecosystem by integrating advanced emergency response capabilities.
why_it_matters: This strategic acquisition aligns with Axon's commitment to innovation and comprehensive public safety solutions, potentially expanding its product offerings and market share in the emergency communications sector.

headline: Lundin Gold Sells Silver Stream to LunR Royalties in $490M Deal
summary: Lundin Gold has agreed to sell a silver stream from its Fruta del Norte mine to LunR Royalties for $490 million, enhancing LunR's position in the precious metals royalty sector.
why_it_matters: This strategic acquisition by LunR Royalties strengthens its portfolio, potentially increasing future cash flows and market competitiveness.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Loads Up 3.33 Million IREN Shares
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald, L.P. disclosed the acquisition of 3,333,423 additional shares of IREN, increasing its position to 1.99% of its 13F assets under management.
why_it_matters: The significant investment by a reputable financial firm underscores confidence in IREN's strategic direction and growth prospects, particularly in AI cloud services, reinforcing the company's competitive moat and long-term investment thesis.
